text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the day of the Mainichi Okan, all eyes are on
the imminent clash between Mejiro Ardan, Oguri
Cap, and Inari One.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Amidst the hype, Mejiro Ardan speaks of how
Oguri Cap, Super Creek, and Inari One are
recently being referred to as the Eternal Top
Three.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Considering this a title well worth overturning,
Mejiro Ardan makes her desire to win evident and
gets ready to race against two of the top three.
